name: Chicken-Broccoli Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Condensed Cream of Chicken & Broccoli Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-quart saucepan, combine the soup, milk and pepper.
2. Heat over medium heat, stirring often until heated through.
3. Serve over broiled or grilled chicken, hot cooked rice, or noodles.
4. Makes about 1 1/2 cups of sauce.
